name: Discord
description: Discord messaging integration - send and receive messages via Discord bot
author: Agent Player Team

fields.name: bot_token
fields.label: Bot Token
fields.helpText: Get this from Discord Developer Portal → Bot → Token

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.helpText: Found in Discord Developer Portal → OAuth2 → Client ID

fields.name: guild_id
fields.label: Guild ID (Optional)
fields.helpText: Right-click your server → Copy ID (enable Developer Mode first)
